original_image_tags: Multiple rubber-stamped ink impressions at the bottom of the page, indicating routing and receipt.

elements.description: Typed document with backward/reversed text, multiple blue and red ink stamps including 'RECEIVED - HARBOR', 'LABORATORY DIVISION FBI AUG 8 10 57 AM 52', and 'U S DEPT of JUSTICE FBI TECHNICAL AUG 8 10 17 A 52'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the presence of multiple ink stamps at the bottom of the page, and Description B's detailed text is an elaboration of the 'rubber-stamped ink impressions' mentioned by A, with no contradictions in the visual content described.
